subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: A seed has been planted in the states of America.  Many people have become stirred and roused to excitement.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ممالک امریکا تخمی افشانده شد نفوس خیلی بحرکت و هیجان آمدند دیگر تا خدا چه خواهد
